name: Pickled Demon Tongue (Major)
description:
This small crystal vial contains the forked end of a demon's tongue, preserved in brine. The spell attack roll of any spell cast by Activating this item is [[/r 1d20+19 #Spell Attack Roll]]{+19}, and the spell DC is 29.

  • Armor You gain resistance 10 to acid and attacks by demons.
  • Weapon After you cast an acid spell by Activating the pickled demon tongue, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional ] damage until end of your next turn.
